headline: The Judicial Appointment Nobody Can Explain
context: The new Chief Justice was appointed in February 2026 after the JAC recommendation was reportedly overridden. No public record of the decision exists.

cards.sub: The question is why the JAC recommendation was reportedly overridden — and by whom.

cards.big: The word 'consult' in Article 122B has never been defined.
Only Commonwealth nation with zero public documentation.
cards.sub: UK publishes shortlists. India publishes decisions. Australia holds hearings.

cards.big: A process with no record cannot prove its own integrity.
cards.sub: Not about this appointee. About the system.

cards.big: Can any future appointment be influenced without detection?
Publish the process. The resistance to publishing tells you who benefits from opacity.
